rationale: Review 2's extra AlgPoints finding is real/grounded (see diff lines 31-32: its def uses unrelated [CommSemiring k][Semiring A][Algebra k A], while docstring claims 'k-points of an affine algebraic group'); acting on it (plus the shared ReductiveGroup/SemisimpleGroup/unipotentRadical_trivial' stubs) produces strictly better docs than Review 1 alone. Both correctly identify the True placeholders, so neither is a pure approve.
